_note: Which NIST SP 800-171 requirements may be placed on a POA&M for CMMC Level 2 Conditional status. Consumed as plain data by logic/readiness.py; asserted by scripts/build_catalog.py --check.

3.13.11.note: CUI encryption employed but not FIPS-validated (-3) may be POA&M'd; not-implemented (-5) may not.
